title: Arctic Report Card spotlights caribou, seals and carbon
summary: The Alaska we experience today and our children will experience in the future is not the Alaska of the past. According to the 2024 Arctic Report Card , released this week by the National Ocean and Atmospheric Administration and co-authored by ten University of Alaska Fairbanks scientists, warming is affecting caribou populations, heat-trapping gas releases and many other parts of the ecosystem. title: Expanding Horizons: The UAE’s Strategic Foray into the Arctic
summary: This article explains the dynamics of the United Arab Emirates (UAE) emerging Arctic strategy and the role of Russia and Norway in it. The post Expanding Horizons: The UAE’s Strategic Foray into the Arctic appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
